inline_comments: Default to OpenClaw workspace media directory
Extract image blocks from Tlon message content. Returns array of image URLs found in the message.
Download a media file from URL to local storage. Returns the local path where the file was saved.
Validate URL is http/https before fetching
Use fetchWithSsrFGuard directly (not urbitFetch) to preserve the full URL path
Download all images from a message and return attachment metadata. Format matches OpenClaw's expected attachment structure.

functions.name: extractImageBlocks
functions.doc: Extract image blocks from Tlon message content.   Returns array of image URLs found in the message.

functions.name: downloadMedia
functions.doc: Download a media file from URL to local storage.   Returns the local path where the file was saved.

functions.name: downloadMessageImages
functions.doc: Download all images from a message and return attachment metadata.   Format matches OpenClaw's expected attachment struc
